overview.description: The Coca-Cola Company, a beverage company, manufactures and sells various nonalcoholic beverages in the United States and internationally. The company provides Trademark Coca-Cola, sparkling soft drinks and flavors; water, sports, coffee, and tea; juice, value-added dairy, and plant-based beverages; and emerging beverages. It also offers beverage concentrates and syrups, as well as fountain syrups to fountain retailers comprising restaurants and convenience stores. The company sells its products under the Coca-Cola, Diet Coke/Coca-Cola Light, C...
overview.financialIntro: In 2025, The Coca-Cola Company's revenue was $47.94 billion, an increase of 1.87% compared to the previous year's $47.06 billion. Earnings were $13.11 billion, an increase of 23.29%.
overview.analystIntro: According to 25 analysts, the average rating for KO stock is "Buy." The 12-month stock price target is $85.97, which is an increase of 7.56% from the latest price.

data.title: The Coca-Cola Company Transcript: 23rd annual dbAccess Global Consumer Conference
data.text: The discussion highlighted sustained value share growth, strategic investments, and a seamless leadership transition. Digital transformation, data-driven revenue management, and strong system partnerships are driving resilience and adaptability. North America and global markets remain key growth areas, with margin improvement and capital flexibility prioritized.

data.title: The Coca-Cola Company Transcript: AGM 2026
data.text: Leadership transitioned to Henrique Braun as CEO, with continued focus on digital transformation, sustainability, and portfolio innovation. All management proposals passed, while shareholder proposals on sustainability, DEI, and transparency were rejected by wide margins.
